title: Dani Rodrik: Artificial intelligence was meant to assist human work, not replace our thinking
description: AI’s impact on jobs is a valid concern, but a bigger risk looms: its takeover of human thought. Letting AI do our brain-work will atrophy our ability to think and incentive to learn. We need norms that will help us harness its power without losing our capacity to expand and use knowledge.
content:
Yet now, it has proven to be an incredible tool that can perform tasks I never thought would be possible in my lifetime.
For example, I have used AI to locate online datasets, manipulate them, carry out statistical tests and produce polished tables a... [5097 chars]
